about.title: A bit About Me
about.paragraph1: Hi, I'm Habib. I started programming because I loved the idea of creating something from nothing, and that feeling still hasn't gone away. These days, I spend most of my time building web applications, working with modern technologies, and constantly learning new things. I enjoy the balance between creativity and problem-solving that software development offers.
about.paragraph2: When I'm working on a project, I care about more than just getting it done. I like understanding the bigger picture, paying attention to the details, and building things the right way. Whether it's a personal side project or a larger platform, I enjoy the challenge of taking an idea, refining it through countless iterations, and eventually turning it into something people can actually use and benefit from.

skills.title: My Skills & Stack
skills.description: Technologies and tools I use to design, build, deploy, and maintain modern web applications.

contact.title: Got a question? Let's chat.
contact.description: I'm just a message away. Whether it's a bug, a collaboration, or just to say hello.

card.title: Questions About How I Work
card.description: Common questions about your project and how I work with clients.

items.question: What kind of projects do you usually work on?
items.answer: I primarily build full-stack web applications, including SaaS platforms, internal management systems, community platforms, e-commerce solutions, and custom business tools. I enjoy taking projects from the initial idea all the way to deployment.

items.question: Do you help with project planning and architecture?
items.answer: Absolutely. Before writing code, I like to understand the business goals, plan the database structure, define the application architecture, and identify potential challenges early. A solid foundation saves a lot of time later.

items.question: Can you handle both front-end and back-end?
items.answer: Yes. I work across the entire stack—from building responsive interfaces with Next.js and Tailwind CSS to designing databases, developing APIs, implementing authentication, and deploying applications.

items.question: How soon can you start?
items.answer: That depends on my current workload and the project's scope, but I usually respond quickly and can often begin planning and discussing requirements within a few days.

items.question: How do you usually work with clients or teams?
items.answer: I prefer clear communication, realistic expectations, and frequent updates. Whether I'm working independently or as part of a team, I focus on transparency, maintainable code, and delivering solutions that continue to work long after launch.
